ddls:
CREATE TABLE "interceptors" (
  "Interceptor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interceptor */,
  "Interceptor_Type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interceptor type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the interceptor */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the interceptor */,
  "attack" INTEGER /* Attack value of the interceptor */,
  "rate_of_fire" INTEGER /* Rate of fire of the interceptor */,
  "impact" INTEGER /* Impact value of the interceptor */,
  "range" INTEGER /* Range of the interceptor */,
  "stability" INTEGER /* Stability value of the interceptor */,
  "reload" INTEGER /* Reload time of the interceptor */,
  "magazine" INTEGER /* Magazine capacity of the interceptor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("Interceptor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interceptors_Interceptor_Type_id FOREIGN KEY ("Interceptor_Type_id") REFERENCES Interceptor_Types ("Interceptor_Type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "Interceptor_Types" (
  "Interceptor_Type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interceptor type */,
  "Interceptor_Type_name" TEXT /* Name of the interceptor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interceptor type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("Interceptor_Type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "Interceptor_Characteristics" (
  "Interceptor_Characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each characteristic */,
  "Interceptor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interceptor the characteristic belongs to */,
  "Characteristic_name" TEXT /* Name of the characteristic */,
  "Characteristic_value" TEXT /* Value of the characteristic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("Interceptor_Characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_Interceptor_Characteristics_Interceptor_id FOREIGN KEY ("Interceptor_id") REFERENCES interceptors ("Interceptor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "Test_Results" (
  "Test_Result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "Interceptor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interceptor the test result belongs to */,
  "Test_Date" TEXT /* Date of the test */,
  "Test_Location" TEXT /* Location of the test */,
  "Test_Scenario" TEXT /* Scenario of the test */,
  "Success_Rate" REAL /* Success rate of the test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("Test_Result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_Test_Results_Interceptor_id FOREIGN KEY ("Interceptor_id") REFERENCES interceptors ("Interceptor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "Maintenance_History" (
  "Maintenance_History_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance history */,
  "Interceptor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interceptor the maintenance history belongs to */,
  "Maintenance_Date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "Maintenance_Type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed */,
  "Maintenance_Status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("Maintenance_History_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_Maintenance_History_Interceptor_id FOREIGN KEY ("Interceptor_id") REFERENCES interceptors ("Interceptor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "Users" (
  "User_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "User_Name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "Email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "Role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, operator) */,
  "Password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("User_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "Access_Logs" (
  "Access_Log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "User_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "Access_Date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "Access_Type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("Access_Log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_Access_Logs_User_id FOREIGN KEY ("User_id") REFERENCES Users ("User_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "Threats" (
  "Threat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threat */,
  "Threat_Name" TEXT /* Name of the threat */,
  "Threat_Type" TEXT /* Type of threat (e.g., ballistic missile, cruise missile) */,
  "Threat_Speed" REAL /* Speed of the threat */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("Threat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "Interceptor_Threat" (
  "Interceptor_Threat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interceptor-threat relationship */,
  "Interceptor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interceptor */,
  "Threat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the threat */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("Interceptor_Threat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_Interceptor_Threat_Interceptor_id FOREIGN KEY ("Interceptor_id") REFERENCES interceptors ("Interceptor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_Interceptor_Threat_Threat_id FOREIGN KEY ("Threat_id") REFERENCES Threats ("Threat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "Simulation_Results" (
  "Simulation_Result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation result */,
  "Interceptor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interceptor the simulation result belongs to */,
  "Simulation_Date" TEXT /* Date of the simulation */,
  "Simulation_Scenario" TEXT /* Scenario of the simulation */,
  "Success_Rate" REAL /* Success rate of the simulation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("Simulation_Result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_Simulation_Results_Interceptor_id FOREIGN KEY ("Interceptor_id") REFERENCES interceptors ("Interceptor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "Sensor_Data" (
  "Sensor_Data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor data */,
  "Interceptor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interceptor the sensor data belongs to */,
  "Sensor_Type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., radar, infrared) */,
  "Sensor_Value" REAL /* Value of the sensor data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("Sensor_Data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_Sensor_Data_Interceptor_id FOREIGN KEY ("Interceptor_id") REFERENCES interceptors ("Interceptor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "Command_Center" (
  "Command_Center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command center */,
  "Command_Center_Name" TEXT /* Name of the command center */,
  "Location" TEXT /* Location of the command center */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("Command_Center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "Command_Center_Access" (
  "Command_Center_Access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command center access */,
  "Command_Center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command center accessing the system */,
  "Access_Date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "Access_Type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("Command_Center_Access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_Command_Center_Access_Command_Center_id FOREIGN KEY ("Command_Center_id") REFERENCES Command_Center ("Command_Center_id")
)
